name: simple-web-app
description: Minimal Flask app with a SQL injection vulnerability on the /user endpoint. Designed for E2E smoke testing of the Argus scan pipeline.

expected_findings.description: String interpolation of user-supplied 'id' parameter into SQL query: SELECT * FROM users WHERE id={user_id}

notes: Only one vulnerable endpoint. Primarily tests sqlmap detection. False-negative if sqlmap/sqli tool doesn't detect string interpolation in query parameter.
